nasb.text: Or if I should bring a sword on that country and say, ‘Let the sword pass through the country and cut off man and beast from it,’

esv.text: “Or if I bring a sword upon that land and say, Let a sword pass through the land, and I cut off from it man and beast,

cnv.text: 如果我使刀劍臨到那地，說：‘願刀劍經過那地，好讓我把人和牲畜從那地剪除。’

ccb.text: 倘若我使刀剑临到那里，毁灭人和牲畜，
